steps.title: Use the two values as a table
steps.content: Since $f$ is linear, the two values determine the whole function. The points are $(0,8)$ and $(1,12)$.

steps.title: Find the slope and intercept
steps.content: The slope is $$\frac{12-8}{1-0}=4.$$ Since $f(0)=8$, the y-intercept is $8$, so $$f(x)=4x+8.$$

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: Choice D — $f \left(x\right)=4x+8$, $f(x)=4x+8$, has slope $4$ and gives $f(0)=8$ and $f(1)=12$. That matches Choice D — $f \left(x\right)=4x+8$.
